films.title: Welcome to the Rileys
films.overview: Years after their teenage daughter’s death, Lois and Doug Riley, an upstanding Indiana couple, are frozen by estranging grief. Doug escapes to New Orleans on a business trip. Compelled by urgencies he doesn’t understand, he insinuates himself into the life of an underage hooker, becoming her platonic guardian.

films.title: Seeking Justice
films.overview: After his wife is assaulted, a husband enlists the services of a vigilante group to help him settle the score.

films.title: The Lucky One
films.overview: A Marine travels to Louisiana after serving three tours in Iraq and searches for the unknown woman he believes was his good luck charm during the war.

films.title: American Heist
films.overview: Two brothers, both with troubled paths, find themselves in the middle of one last bank job.

films.title: Black or White
films.overview: A grieving widower is drawn into a custody battle over his granddaughter, whom he helped raise her entire life.

films.title: Barefoot
films.overview: The "black sheep" son of a wealthy family meets a young psychiatric patient who's been raised in isolation her entire life. He takes the naive young woman home for his brother's wedding an improbable romance blooms, as she impresses everyone with her genuine, simple charms.

films.title: Lisa Frankenstein
films.overview: In 1989, a misunderstood teenager has a high school crush — who just happens to be a handsome corpse! After a set of playfully horrific circumstances bring him back to life, the two embark on a murderous journey to find love, happiness…and a few missing body parts along the way.

films.title: Front of the Class
films.overview: A boy with Tourette's syndrome overcomes criticism and discrimination to achieve his dream of becoming a teacher.

films.title: I Saw the Light
films.overview: Singer and songwriter Hank Williams rises to fame in the 1940s, but alcohol abuse and infidelity take a toll on his career and marriage to fellow musician Audrey Mae Williams.

films.title: Gifted
films.overview: Frank, a single man raising his child prodigy niece Mary, is drawn into a custody battle with his mother.

films.title: The Perfect Date
films.overview: No beau? No problem! To earn money for college, a high schooler creates a dating app that lets him act as a stand-in boyfriend.

films.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
films.overview: As Nell Sweetzer tries to build a new life, the evil force that once possessed her returns with an even more horrific plan.
